hooks.prompt: Check the file extension. ONLY respond if the file has one of these extensions: .html, .css, .scss, .sass, .less, .js, .jsx, .ts, .tsx, .vue, .svelte, .astro. For those files: note 1-2 relevant UX laws in 1 sentence. For ALL OTHER file types: respond with EXACTLY an empty string. Do NOT explain why you are silent. Do NOT mention the file type. Just empty response.
